# CR7 — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A dedicated fan and informational website about Cristiano Ronaldo, one of the greatest footballers of all time. The site aims to showcase his full career journey — from his early days in Madeira to becoming a global football legend — highlighting his achievements, records, titles, awards (like Ballon d'Or wins), and career statistics. The design should feel modern, dynamic, and energetic, reflecting Ronaldo's powerful and iconic personal brand.

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About CR7
A dedicated fan and informational website about Cristiano Ronaldo, one of the greatest footballers of all time. The site aims to showcase his full career journey — from his early days in Madeira to becoming a global football legend — highlighting his achievements, records, titles, awards (like Ballon d'Or wins), and career statistics. The design should feel modern, dynamic, and energetic, reflecting Ronaldo's powerful and iconic personal brand.

## Services/Products
- הישגי קריירה
- סטטיסטיקות
- ביוגרפיה
- ציר זמן של הקריירה

## Target Audience
מעריצי כדורגל, מעריצי רונאלדו

## Industry
ספורט / כדורגל
